details.reasoning: The diff is incomplete/truncated, cutting off mid-file in runtime-api.ts. Visible requirements are largely met: package.json has @openclaw/pulseboard scoped name and setupEntry field; openclaw.plugin.json has channels and configSchema; src/channel.ts uses createChatChannelPlugin with chatTypes ['direct', 'group'], textChunkLimit 4000, outbound sendText capability, gateway, and messaging; index.ts uses defineChannelPluginEntry; setup-entry.ts uses defineSetupPluginEntry; no existing files are modified. However, critical requirements cannot be fully verified: (1) src/types.ts content is not shown in the diff, preventing verification of PulseBoardAccount, PulseBoardConfig, PulseBoardMessage interfaces with boardUrl and apiToken fields; (2) src/runtime.ts is not shown, preventing verification of createPluginRuntimeStore with get/set accessors. The imports and file structure suggest these files exist and are properly implemented, but the incomplete diff prevents complete verification of all rubric requirements.
